label: Transparent anemone bloom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Anemone transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a complete anemone bloom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A woodland floor anemone bloom, recognizable as a white wood anemone: five to seven delicate white petals with subtle translucent veining, a warm yellow center with fine stamens, small fresh leaf-green bracts and leaves, crisp botanical detail, calm natural texture, clean studio lighting. The bloom should read as anemone, not daisy, poppy, lotus, rose, or magnolia.
Composition/framing: centered complete flower cutout with leaf-green foliage visible, generous padding on every side, no cropping.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape, no second flower, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Anemone light-mode design-system board
Input image: use the visible transparent anemone motif cutout as the source reference.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named "Morphous Anemone", clearly derived from the provided anemone bloom motif cutout.
Reference use: Use the visible anemone bloom as the source of truth. Extract white translucent petals, warm yellow center, fresh leaf green, muted woodland-floor brown, soft moss shadows, and calm clean editorial rhythm. The board must visibly respect the motif colors and botanical textures.
Canvas: strict 16:9 landscape design board, target 3840x2160, wide 4K-class source asset. Do not create a square or portrait image.
Resolution and legibility: large readable section labels, precise editorial grid, generous section spacing, fewer larger token rows, no dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Anemone, Anemone Bloom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, modal, popover, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, metrics, charts, data table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius guidance, border tokens, soft shadow tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: clean editorial English product UI, refined readable display headings, compact data labels; Japanese typography guidance using Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic for interface text and a Mincho-style option for editorial display headings. Include short readable Japanese samples.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn token language with semantic variables: background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart, sidebar, radius.
Color palette: motif-derived near-neutrals, greens, yellows, and woodland floor browns only, with named swatches: Petal White, Pollen Yellow, Leaf Green, Moss Vein, Woodland Floor, Petal Shadow, Seed Ink, Porcelain Surface, Soft Bark Border.
Visual style: clean editorial product system, airy white petal surfaces, leaf-green primary actions, pollen-yellow focus rings, woodland-floor navigation accents, subtle paper and petal-vein texture, calm dense dashboards, crisp component edges, 8px card radius.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Anemone, no tiny illegible text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Anemone dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent anemone motif cutout and the visible Morphous Anemone light design-system board as references.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board for "Morphous Anemone" that feels like the provided light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the same anemone motif-derived palette roles, component language, clean editorial rhythm, texture samples, spacing, typography choices, and dashboard/product UI structure from the light board. Translate white petal surfaces into luminous foregrounds, leaf green into primary actions, pollen yellow into focus/accent rings, and woodland-floor brown into grounded dark surfaces.
Canvas: strict 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160, wide 4K-class source asset, at least 2400px wide if possible. Do not create a square or portrait image.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, precise editorial grid, generous section spacing, fewer larger token rows, no dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Anemone, Anemone Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, modal, popover, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, metrics, charts, data table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius guidance, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: clean editorial English product UI with refined readable display headings; Japanese typography guidance using Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic for interface text and a Mincho-style option for editorial display headings. Include short readable Japanese samples.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn token language with semantic variables: background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart, sidebar, radius.
Dark palette: deepest seed ink and woodland-floor backgrounds, muted moss and leaf-green surfaces, ivory petal foregrounds, warm pollen-yellow highlights, soft bark borders, restrained red destructive state only where needed.
Visual style: dark clean editorial product system, calm woodland floor surfaces, subtle petal-vein and paper texture overlays, leaf-green primary controls, pollen-yellow focus rings, low-glare cards, crisp component edges, 8px card radius, restrained shadows.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon palette, no flat pure-black background unless used only as a tiny ink token, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Anemone, no tiny illegible text.
